Author: Dasha
Name: DashaTweaks
Punchline: Quality-of-life tweaks: hotbar audit, submarine routes, craft-leve hand-ins, expert delivery, and glamour sync.
Description:
A growing collection of FFXIV quality-of-life tweaks, each in its own settings tab:

- Hotbar Helper: when you open Actions & Traits, scans your hotbars against your current job and shows any actions or role actions you haven't slotted anywhere — then drag an icon straight onto a hotbar slot to assign it.
- Submarines: FC submarine status with per-sub EXP bars, plus a tabbed voyage route planner — EXP/hour levelling routes (with fuel cost), exploration routes that reveal the most still-undiscovered locations, and gil-farming routes (per-sub gil/hour, build and rank requirements) — with one-click apply, optional unlock-progression routing, and auto-repair.
- Leves: automated craft (tradecraft) leve hand-ins — pick a leve, stand at the counter, and it accepts and turns in until your allowance floor or items run out.
- Expert Delivery: adds a "Turn in all" button to the Grand Company Expert Delivery window that hands in every listed item and confirms each delivery for you.
- Glamour Sync: keeps a gear set's portrait matching its gear — after a glamour plate, a job change, or equipping Recommended Gear — so the "portrait doesn't match" warning stays gone.
